rules.description: Expect the number of columns to be between two values.
rules.input_args:
min_value: <integer or None> The minimum number of columns, inclusive.
max_value: <integer or None> The maximum number of columns, inclusive.
rules.name: expect_table_column_count_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect table column count to be between

rules.description: Expect the number of rows to be between two values.
rules.input_args:
min_value: <integer or None> The minimum number of rows, inclusive.
max_value: <integer or None> The maximum number of rows, inclusive.
rules.name: expect_table_row_count_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect table row count to be between

rules.description: Expect the column values to not be null.
rules.input_args: column: <string> The list of column names.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_not_be_null
rules.display_name: Expect list of column values to not be null

rules.description: Expect a column to contain values of a specified data type.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
type_: <string> A string representing the data type that column should have as entries.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_be_of_type
rules.display_name: Expect column values to be of type

rules.description: Expect the set of distinct column values to be contained by a given set.
rules.input_args:
column: <string>  The column name.
value_set: <set-like> A set of objects used for comparison.
rules.name: expect_column_distinct_values_to_be_in_set
rules.display_name: Expect column distinct values to be in set

rules.description: Expect the columns to exactly match a specified list.
rules.input_args: column_list: <list of strings> The column names, in the correct order.
rules.name: expect_table_columns_to_match_ordered_list
rules.display_name: Expect table columns to match ordered list

rules.description: Expect the columns to exist.
rules.input_args: column: <string> The list of column names.
rules.name: expect_column_to_exist
rules.display_name: Expect column to exist

rules.description: Expect each column value to be unique.
rules.input_args: column: <string> The list of column names.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_be_unique
rules.display_name: Expect list of column values to be unique independently

rules.description: Expect the column values to be increasing.
rules.input_args: column: <string> The column name.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_be_increasing
rules.display_name: Expect column values to be increasing

rules.description: Expect the column values to be decreasing.
rules.input_args: column: <string> The column name.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_be_decreasing
rules.display_name: Expect column values to be decreasing

rules.description: Expect a column to contain values from a specified type list.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
type_list: <list of strings or None> A list of strings representing the data type that each column should have as entries.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_be_in_type_list
rules.display_name: Expect column values to be in type list

rules.description: Expect the column entries to be strings that match a given regular expression.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
regex: <string> The regular expression the column entries should match.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_match_regex
rules.display_name: Expect column values to match regex

rules.description: Expect the column entries to be strings that do not match a given regular expression.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
regex: <string> The regular expression the column entries should not match.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_not_match_regex
rules.display_name: Expect column values to not match regex

rules.description: Expect the column entries to be strings that can be matched to either any of or all of a list of regular expressions.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
regex_list: <list> The list of regular expressions which the column entries should match.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_match_regex_list
rules.display_name: Expect column values to match regex list

rules.description: Expect the set of distinct column values to contain a given set.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
value_set: <set-like> A set of objects used for comparison.
rules.name: expect_column_distinct_values_to_contain_set
rules.display_name: Expect column distinct values to contain set

rules.description: Expect the set of distinct column values to equal a given set.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
value_set: <set-like> A set of objects used for comparison.
rules.name: expect_column_distinct_values_to_equal_set
rules.display_name: Expect column distinct values to equal set

rules.description: Expect the column maximum to be between a minimum value and a maximum value.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name
min_value: <comparable type or None> The minimum value of the acceptable range for the column maximum.
max_value: <comparable type or None> The maximum value of the acceptable range for the column maximum.
rules.name: expect_column_max_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect column max to be between

rules.description: Expect the column minimum to be between a minimum value and a maximum value.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name
min_value: <comparable type or None> The minimum value of the acceptable range for the column minimum.
max_value: <comparable type or None> The maximum value of the acceptable range for the column minimum.
rules.name: expect_column_min_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect column min to be between

rules.description: Expect the column to sum to be between a minimum value and a maximum value.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
min_value: <comparable type or None> The minimal sum allowed.
max_value: <comparable type or None> The maximal sum allowed.
rules.name: expect_column_sum_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect column sum to be between

rules.description: Expect the number of unique values to be between a minimum value and a maximum value.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
min_value: <integer or None> The minimum number of unique values allowed.
max_value: <integer or None> The maximum number of unique values allowed.
rules.name: expect_column_unique_value_count_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect column unique value count to be between

rules.description: Expect the most common value to be within the designated value set.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
value_set: <set-like> A list of potential values to match.
rules.name: expect_column_most_common_value_to_be_in_set
rules.display_name: Expect column most common value to be in set

rules.description: Expect the proportion of unique values to be between a minimum value and a maximum value.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
min_value: <float or None> The minimum proportion of unique values (Proportions are on the range 0 to 1).
max_value: <float or None> The maximum proportion of unique values (Proportions are on the range 0 to 1).
rules.name: expect_column_proportion_of_unique_values_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect column proportion of unique values to be between

rules.description: Expect the values in column A to be greater than column B.
rules.input_args:
column_A: <string> The first column name.
column_B: <string> The second column name.
rules.name: expect_column_pair_values_a_to_be_greater_than_b
rules.display_name: Expect column pair values a to be greater than b

rules.description: Expect the values in column A to be the same as column B.
rules.input_args:
column_A: <string> The first column name.
column_B: <string> The second column name.
rules.name: expect_column_pair_values_to_be_equal
rules.display_name: Expect column pair values to be equal

rules.description: Expect the paired values from columns A and B to belong to a set of valid pairs.
rules.input_args:
column_A: <string> The first column name.
column_B: <string> The second column name.
value_pairs_set: <list of tuples> All the valid pairs to be matched.
rules.name: expect_column_pair_values_to_be_in_set
rules.display_name: Expect column pair values to be in set

rules.description: Expect the values for each record to be unique across the columns listed.
rules.input_args: column_list: <tuple or list> The column names to evaluate.
rules.name: expect_select_column_values_to_be_unique_within_record
rules.display_name: Expect select column values to be unique within record

rules.description: Expect the compound columns to be unique.
rules.input_args: column_list: <tuple or set> Set of columns to be checked.
rules.name: expect_compound_columns_to_be_unique
rules.display_name: Expect compound columns to be unique

rules.description: Expect the number of rows to equal a value.
rules.input_args: value: <integer> The expected number of rows.
rules.name: expect_table_row_count_to_equal
rules.display_name: Expect table row count to equal

rules.description: Expect the columns to match an unordered set.
rules.input_args: column_set: <list of strings> The column names, in any order.
rules.name: expect_table_columns_to_match_set
rules.display_name: Expect table columns to match set

rules.description: Expect the column values to be null.
rules.input_args: column: <string> The list of column names.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_be_null
rules.display_name: Expect list of column values to be null

rules.description: Expect the column entries to be between a minimum value and a maximum value (inclusive).
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
min_value: <comparable type or None> The minimum value for a column entry.
max_value: <comparable type or None> The maximum value for a column entry.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect column values to be between

rules.description: Expect column entries to not be in the set.
rules.input_args:
column: <string>  The column name.
value_set: <set-like> A set of objects used for comparison.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_not_be_in_set
rules.display_name: Expect column values to not be in set

rules.description: Expect the column entries to be strings with length between a minimum value and a maximum value (inclusive).
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
min_value: <int or None> The minimum value for a column entry.
max_value: <int or None> The maximum value for a column entry.
rules.name: expect_column_value_lengths_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect column value lengths to be between

rules.description: Expect the column entries to be strings with length equal to the provided value.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
value: <integer> The expected value for a column entry length.
rules.name: expect_column_value_lengths_to_equal
rules.display_name: Expect column value lengths to equal

rules.description: Expect the column mean to be between a minimum value and a maximum value (inclusive).
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
min_value: <float or None> The minimum value for the column mean.
max_value: <float or None> The maximum value for the column mean.
rules.name: expect_column_mean_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect column mean to be between

rules.description: Expect the column median to be between a minimum value and a maximum value.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
min_value: <int or None> The minimum value for the column median.
max_value: <int or None> The maximum value for the column median.
rules.name: expect_column_median_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect column median to be between

rules.description: Expect the column standard deviation to be between a minimum value and a maximum value.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
min_value: <float or None> The minimum value for the column standard deviation.
max_value: <float or None> The maximum value for the column standard deviation.
rules.name: expect_column_stdev_to_be_between
rules.display_name: Expect column standard deviation to be between

rules.description: Expect the column values to not match the regex list.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
regex_list: <list> The list of regular expressions which the column entries should not match.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_not_match_regex_list
rules.display_name: Expect column values to not match regex list

rules.description: Expect the column values to be json parseable.
rules.input_args: column: <string> The column name.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_be_json_parseable
rules.display_name: Expect column values to be json parseable

rules.description: Expect column values to match the json schema.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
json_schema: <string> The JSON schema (in string form) to match.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_match_json_schema
rules.display_name: Expect column values to match json schema

rules.description: Expect the column values to be dateutil parseable.
rules.input_args: column: <string> The column name.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_be_dateutil_parseable
rules.display_name: Expect column values to be dateutil parseable

rules.description: Expect the table column count to be equal.
rules.input_args: value: <int> The expected number of columns.
rules.name: expect_table_column_count_to_equal
rules.display_name: Expect table column count to equal

rules.description: Expect the Z-scores of a column's values to be less than a given threshold.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name of a numerical column.
threshold: <int> A maximum Z-score threshold. All column Z-scores that are lower than this threshold will evaluate successfully.
double_sided: <boolean> A True or False value indicating whether to evaluate double sidedly.
rules.name: expect_column_value_z_scores_to_be_less_than
rules.display_name: Expect Column Value Z Scores To Be Less Than

rules.description: Expect column values to match the specified strftime date/time format.
rules.input_args:
column: <string> The column name.
strftime_format: <string> The strftime format to match.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_match_strftime_format
rules.display_name: Expect column values to match strftime format

rules.description: Expect the sum of multiple columns to be equal across rows.
rules.input_args:
column_list: <list> List of columns to sum.
sum_total: <integer> Expected row sum.
rules.name: expect_multicolumn_sum_to_equal
rules.display_name: Expect multicolumn sum to equal

rules.description: Expect column values to be valid JSON arrays that conform to the provided JSON schema, ensuring the correct structure, required fields, and data types.
rules.name: expect_column_values_to_match_json_array_schema
rules.display_name: Expect column values to match JSON array schema

rules.description: This rule helps in finding data quality issues using user defined code.
rules.input_args: value: <textedit> The data quality code has to be entered. Please utilize df as the variable name for both input and output dataframes.
rules.name: expect_using_user_defined_code
rules.display_name: Expect data quality issues using custom Python code
